case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LIANG, VICTORIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,140.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
